74.教室の授業が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n自分の教室で 授業を:
Class Lessons are now unlocked!
By taking lessons in your classroom, you can obtain Skill Notebooks of your choosing.
What's more, your Academic Level will rise the more lessons you take, allowing you to obtain even better Skill Notebooks.
Once you get your hands on some Lesson Tickets, be sure to take advantage of any lessons that become available!

298.追加スキルが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\nフウキの仲間に 追加:
Additional skills have been unlocked!
By giving SCC members additional skills, they'll be able to take on a much wider variety of roles.
Try choosing additional skills for each member!

451.購買部が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n解放された 購買部のお店:
The School Shop is now open!
The School Shop has a variety of items to purchase, such as equipment, items, and gifts.
Use the Feld or Fel Marks you've earned to purchase whatever you'd like!

637.教練バトルが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n教練バトルは 学園内:
Training Battles are now unlocked!
Training Battles are cooperative challenges where a party of four takes on a boss monster.
By defeating these bosses, you can earn powerful equipment and accessories or Asfeld Medals.
You won't lose anything if defeated, so give them a try! Talk to the Executive Committee member in your classroom to get started!

915.新しいお店が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n購買部に 新しいお店:
A new shop has opened!
A new shop just opened in the School Shop. This new shop has for sale even more powerful accessories than before.
Take advantage of these new wares to strengthen you and your companions even further!

1078.サマー★ナイトが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n自分の教室から\:
Summer's Night is now unlocked! You may now participate in the Summer's Night training battle from your classroom.
Emerging victorious will allow you to create new Festival Accessories, so prepare yourself and give it a try!

1247.絆エピソードが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n仲間との 絆のチカ:
Bonding Episodes are now available!
Once your bond power with a companion reaches level 3, a special "Bond Episode" with them will unlock.
Through these Bond Episodes, you can deepen the connection with your companions more than ever before.

1411.学園コーデが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n学園コーデは 装備の:
School Glamour is now available!
Using School Glamour, you can change the appearance of you and your companions' equipment while keeping its stats intact.
Talk to Mrs. Renedor in the Sewing Room to get started!

1581.プラチナクラスが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n自分の教室から\:
Platinum Class is now unlocked!
You may now participate in Platinum Class training battles from your classroom.
Emerge victorious, and you'll be able to upgrade your equipment. Prepare yourself for some tough battles!

1753.スキル強化が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\nフウキの仲間たちの:
Skill Enhancement is now unlocked!
The skills that the SCC members have learned can now be enhanced to make them even more powerful.
Head to back to the Strategy Room.

1876.？？？が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\nシュメリア先生が\n何か:
??? is now unlocked! Ms. Sumeria seems to have something planned...
The next time you have a day off, try talking with her.

2003.？？？が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\nまた何か 計画が進行して:
??? is now unlocked!
It seems yet another plan is already in motion...
After clearing Chapter 7, try speaking with Ms. Sumeria.

2107.？？？が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\nまた 何かの 計画が進行:
??? is now unlocked!
It seems yet another plan is already in motion...
After clearing Chapter 8, try speaking with Ms. Sumeria.

2214.チャンスとくぎが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n戦闘中に チャン:
Chance skills are now unlocked!
During battle, when your Chance skill activates, SCC members will automatically use their Chance skills.
When they learn a Chance skill, you can check its effects in the "Stats" menu.

2395.ウィンター★ナイトが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n自分の教室か:
Winter's Night is now unlocked! You may now participate in the Winter's Night training battle from your classroom.
Emerging victorious will allow you to create new Festival Accessories, so prepare yourself and give it a try!

2573.ロイヤルクラスが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n自分の教室から\:
Royal Class is now unlocked!
You may now participate in Royal Class training battles from your classroom.
Emerge victorious, and you'll be able to upgrade your equipment. Prepare yourself for some tough battles!

2745.部活動が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n部活に入ることで 鍛冶:
Clubs are now available!
By joining a club, you can experience working in a craft such as smithing, woodworking, and sewing.
Speak with the club presidents in the various clubrooms located in the Second School Building, and join what interests you most!

2922.オータム★ナイトが 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n自分の教室から:
Autumn's Night is now unlocked! You may now participate in the Autumn's Night training battle from your classroom.
Emerging victorious will allow you to create new Festival Accessories, so prepare yourself and give it a try!

3095.購買部の新商品が 解放された！\n<me 60>\n<br>\n購買部の新商品と:
New items are now available in the School Shop!
New accessories have been added to the shop's inventory.
Use these new accessories to strengthen you and your companions even further!
